mapper.insert: INSERT INTO medical_order (order_no, user_id, pet_id, doctor_id, department_id, appointment_time, symptom, price, status, remark) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{petId}, #{doctorId}, #{departmentId}, #{appointmentTime}, #{symptom}, #{price}, #{status}, #{remark})
mapper.select: SELECT mo.id, mo.order_no, mo.user_id, mo.pet_id, mo.doctor_id, mo.department_id, mo.appointment_time, mo.symptom, mo.price, mo.status, mo.remark, mo.create_time, mo.update_time, pet.name AS pet_name, u.username AS owner_name, doc.name AS doctor_name, dept.name AS department_name FROM medical_order mo LEFT JOIN pet ON mo.pet_id = pet.id LEFT JOIN user u ON mo.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN doctor doc ON mo.doctor_id = doc.id LEFT JOIN department dept ON mo.department_id = dept.id WHERE mo.id = #{id}

SELECT mo.id, mo.order_no, mo.user_id, mo.pet_id, mo.doctor_id, mo.department_id, mo.appointment_time, mo.symptom, mo.price, mo.status, mo.remark, mo.create_time, mo.update_time, pet.name AS pet_name, u.username AS owner_name, doc.name AS doctor_name, dept.name AS department_name FROM medical_order mo LEFT JOIN pet ON mo.pet_id = pet.id LEFT JOIN user u ON mo.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN doctor doc ON mo.doctor_id = doc.id LEFT JOIN department dept ON mo.department_id = dept.id WHERE mo.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY mo.create_time DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE medical_order SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
